title: Looking for Teacher at Lovely Professional University Capital India

jsonLd.title: Looking for Teacher at Lovely Professional University Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Lovely Professional University Capital India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Howrah operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Lovely Professional University Capital India:
Lovely Professional University Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lovely Professional University Capital India!
